name: Gusto API
what_it_does: Payroll and HR platform API for automating payroll runs, managing employee benefits, handling tax compliance, and syncing HR data with other systems.
use_cases: Triggering payroll runs and retrieving payroll summaries from agents
Syncing employee onboarding data from HRIS to Gusto
Retrieving compensation and benefits data for reporting
Building HR data pipelines between Gusto and other tools
not_for: Large enterprise HR (500+ employees) - enterprise-grade HRIS may be needed
Real-time payroll calculations without payroll run initiation
best_when: Your small-to-mid-size US company uses Gusto and you need to automate payroll, benefits, or employee management workflows.
avoid_when: You need international payroll, enterprise-scale HR capabilities, or are not using Gusto.

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 required for all access. System access tokens available for partner integrations. Granular scopes per resource.

pricing.notes: Developer demo environment available for testing. API access included with Gusto subscription. Partner program for ISVs.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST-standard JSON errors with message and errors fields. Documentation is developer-friendly with examples.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency keys. Payroll run triggers are especially dangerous without idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: Payroll runs have multi-step workflow (create, calculate, submit) - agents must follow the sequence
OAuth tokens are company-specific - separate authorization required per company
Payroll calculations are not idempotent - duplicate runs create real payroll payments
Employee SSN and sensitive fields require additional OAuth scopes with elevated security review
Developer environment (demo) is separate from production - data does not transfer

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth2 with payroll-specific scopes. SOC2 Type II. Payroll and HR data is among the most sensitive PII — Social Security numbers, salary, bank accounts. Strict access control required. PCI DSS for payment data.
